Raw client data is stored in Object Storage&nbsp;<br><div>2. Data is processed utilizing custom tools or data preparation and transformation features available in watsonx.ai.&nbsp;</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; Machine learning models create vector indexes/embeddings and store 'in-memory'&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">watsonx.ai.</span><span style="background-color: initial;">&nbsp;</span></div><div><div>3. User asks natural language question on watsonx.ai UI (Query)<br>4. Gen AI app routes question through to watsonx.ai<br>5. watsonx.ai queries the watsonx.ai in-memory vector index to get the relevant content (Retrieval)<br>6. The received content is sent to LLM to generate a summary (Generation)<br>7. Generated summary response is sent to the requesting Gen AI app<br>8. Generated summarized response is received by the user (Response)</div></div>" style="text;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;html=1;" Raw client data is stored in Object Storage<div>2. Data is processed utilizing custom tools or data preparation and transformation features available in watsonx.ai.&nbsp;</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; Machine learning models create vector indexes/embeddings and store 'in-memory'&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">watsonx.ai,&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: initial;">or in Elasticsearch or&nbsp;</span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">&nbsp; &nbsp; watsonx.data&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: initial;">Milvus vector db.</span></div><div><div>3. User asks natural language question on watsonx.ai UI (Query)</div><div>4. Gen AI app routes question through to watsonx.ai</div><div>5. watsonx.ai queries the watsonx.ai in-memory or Elasticsearch or Milvus vector index to get the relevant content (Retrieval)</div><div>6. The received content is sent to LLM to generate a summary (Generation)</div><div>7. Generated summary response is sent to the requesting Gen AI app</div><div>8. Generated summarized response is received by the user (Response)</div></div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" Raw client data is stored in Object Storage&nbsp;<div>2.&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">Data is processed utilizing custom tools or data preparation and transformation features available in watsonx Asssitant/Orchestrate.&nbsp;</span></div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; Machine learning models create vector indexes/embeddings and store in Elasticsearch vector db. Alternatively&nbsp;</div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">&nbsp; &nbsp; create and store keyword indexes in Watson Discovery.</span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">3. User asks natural language question (Query)</span><br></div><div>4. Gen AI app routes question through watsonx Assistant (for conversational flow)&nbsp;</div><div>5. watsonx Assistant queries the vector or keyword indexes to get the relevant content (Retrieval)</div><div>6. The received content is sent to embedded LLM to generate a summary (Generation)</div><div>7. Generated summary response is sent to the requesting Gen AI app</div><div>8. Generated summarized response is received by the user (Response)</div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" id="XmKC3DB3JVievzPESg25-45" value="<div>1. Raw client data is stored in Object Storage&nbsp;</div><div>2. Data is processed utilizing custom tools or data preparation and transformation features available in watsonx.ai or watsonx Asssitant&nbsp;</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; or Orchestrate.&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">Machine learning models create vector indexes/embeddings and store 'in-memory' watsonx.ai or in Elasticsearch or&nbsp;</span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">&nbsp; &nbsp; watsonx.data Milvus&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: initial;">vector db. Alternatively&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: initial;">create and store keyword indexes in Watson Discovery.</span></div><div>3. User asks natural language question (Query)</div><div>4. Gen AI app routes question through watsonx Assistant (for conversational flow) or through watsonx.ai</div><div>5. watsonx Assistant or watsonx.ai queries the vector or keyword indexes to get the relevant content (Retrieval)</div><div>6. The received content is sent to LLM to generate a summary (Generation)</div><div>7. Generated summary response is sent to the requesting Gen AI app</div><div>8. Generated summarized response is received by the user (Response)</div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;"
